preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: These settings are saved locally on this device
preferences.gpsFormatHint: Choose how GPS coordinates are displayed in the application
preferences.navigationAppsHint: Choose which navigation buttons to display next to coordinates
preferences.navDisplayModeHint: Choose how navigation links are displayed in station details
preferences.navDisplayInlineDesc: Small icon next to GPS coordinates opening a dropdown menu
preferences.navDisplayButtonsDesc: Buttons displayed below the Info section
preferences.radiolinesMinZoomHint: Set the minimum zoom level at which radiolines become visible on the map
preferences.mapStationsLimitHint: Maximum number of stations displayed on the map at once
preferences.mapRadiolinesLimitHint: Maximum number of radiolines displayed on the map at once
preferences.stationPhotoPanelHint: Show a photo panel to the right of the station details dialog on desktop
preferences.mapHoverTooltipHint: Show a preview tooltip when hovering over station markers on the map
preferences.mapPointStyleHint: Choose how stations are displayed on the map
preferences.mapPointStyleDotsDesc: Compact filled circles with operator colors
preferences.mapPointStyleMarkersDesc: Location pin markers with operator colors
preferences.mapRightClickMeasureHint: Right-click anywhere on the map to set a measurement reference point
preferences.mapMeasureCircleHint: Draw a circle with a specified radius around the reference point on the map
preferences.mapMeasureCircleNote: Tip: Press <kbd>C</kbd> on the map to quickly toggle the coverage circle.
preferences.showAzimuthsHint: Display azimuth direction lines from station locations on the map
preferences.showAzimuthsNote: Only available when using UKE as the data source, and only for stations where the permit originates from the device registry.
preferences.azimuthsMinZoomHint: Set the minimum zoom level at which azimuths become visible on the map
preferences.azimuthLineLengthHint: Set the length of azimuth direction lines drawn on the map
preferences.notificationsHint: Manage push notification subscriptions for this browser
preferences.notificationsBlocked: Notifications are blocked by the browser. Enable them in your browser settings to use this feature.
preferences.ukeUpdatesHint: Get notified when new UKE station data is imported
preferences.submissionUpdatesHint: Get notified when your submissions are reviewed
preferences.newSubmissionsHint: Get notified when users submit new data for review

emailVerification.unverifiedDescription: Verify your email to secure your account.

password.setSubtitle: Passwordless account - sign in with passkey only
password.changeSubtitle: Enter your current password to set a new one
password.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
password.passkeyHint: You'll be asked to verify with your passkey before setting a password.

passwordless.title: Passwordless account
passwordless.description: Remove your password and sign in only with passkeys.
passwordless.success: Password removed. You can now sign in with passkeys only.
passwordless.noPassword: No password set. Passkey sign-in only.
passwordless.requiresPasskey: You need at least one passkey before removing your password.
passwordless.passkeyLoadError: Could not load passkeys. Refresh to try again.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.revokeConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to revoke "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone and any applications using this key will stop working.
apiKeys.noKeysDescription: Create an API key to access the OpenBTS API programmatically.

dialog.title: Create API Key
dialog.description: This key will have read-only access to public API endpoints.

success.title: Key created successfully
success.warning: Store this key securely. You won't be able to view it again after closing this dialog.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data

init.heading: Confirm your identity
init.description: Enter your current password to begin setup.
init.errorNoUri: No TOTP URI returned. Please try again.

scan.hint: Open your authenticator app and scan
scan.backupCodesDescription: 8 single-use backup codes were generated. Store them somewhere safe. You'll need them if you lose access to your authenticator app.
scan.securityNote: Your secret key is encrypted and never shared. This QR code is only shown once.

verify.heading: Verify your app
verify.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to confirm setup.

success.heading: Two-factor authentication is active
success.description: Your account is now protected with an extra layer of security. You'll need your authenticator app each time you sign in.
